texto: No use kidding herself. This situation with Jarrod was a slippery slope. She’d had plenty of men since Sam, attractive, well endowed, charming in many ways. Jarrod was different, and she needed to figure out why before she found herself in the middle of stupid. She had a business to think of, people who depended on her for their livelihood, even more people present and future who needed the services she offered. It wasn’t just a job, damn it, it was a mission. No one should be as out of touch with themselves as thoroughly as she had been. For as long.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Lizzie Ashworth sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “No use kidding herself. This situation with Jarrod was a slippery slope. She’d had plenty of men …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, bdsm, erotica, útil em momentos de termino e erotica.
